images.name: technitium-classic-authority
images.capabilityProof: The startup bootstrap reads the live API version, denies recursion, creates the deterministic plab.test primary zone, and installs the TTL-zero A record before serving classic DNS over UDP

knownLimitations: This source/config-only wrapper does not redistribute the Technitium image or binaries; Docker acquires the immutable upstream image by digest.
Only deterministic plab.test A over classic DNS UDP is claimed.

The TCP endpoint passes a one-query validity check but closes the diagnostic workload's reused connection after roughly 2100 measured queries; the resulting EOF violates the zero-failure and connection-reuse contract, so TCP is unsupported.
The synthetic exact 630-byte truncation fixture and encrypted transports remain explicit unsupported lanes.
